TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yanping Yanping a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 480.64 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 419.42 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 48.33 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 3,828 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,131 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 3,523 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 92%(Bunun) ku kasabinawlan. u atu Bunun ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Yanping mala 5 a cuwen atu 11 ku niyazu'. kina 11 a niyazu'sa, Kainisungan , Kamisatu , Kaminu , Nakanu , Su nun sung , Buklavu , Kalisahan , Minami , Vakangan , Pasikau , Talunas . ŚĽ∂ŚĻ≥ťĄČ(ťÉ°Áĺ§ŚłÉŤĺ≤Ť™ě:Inpiing) 7šļļ/km¬≤, . yin-pin a kenis (u sasakamuan nu bunung a kamu: lnpiing ) na i Taywan pusungkuay a kenis, i teban nu pusungku i, satipan micapi tu i amisay nu hay-tuwan a kenis, saamis nu timulan malalitin tu lu-yi a kenis, i sawali micapi tu tung-he a kenis, satipan sa micapi tu takawse maw-li a kenis, pintungku u'-tay akenis, i satimulan malitin tupiwma a kenis, hamin nu ku u limaay a buyu'ay nu yincumin a kakenis, hamin nu tademaw i kenis hatida u pituay nu tademaw/km2, hamin nukanatal idaw kya sakatuluay nu talakaway a pikawawan, u yadah nu tademaw hawsa hamin nu kanatal u sadikuday nu sakasepad. u yin-pin a kenis i naayaw nu dipung a ziday '' pusungtin kuwn-san-cing pikuwan a kenis '' u niydu'niyadu'ay a lala' i satimulan nu pangkiw( nu saamisan nu pangkiw, ni kalalais tu nadikudan misaduma aca patiden tu hay-tuwan a kenis ). ya kitidaan nu lala' sa kipabawan ku cung-yang-san-may, u ahebal nu lala' i buyu'ay a kenis siwa a bataan idaw ku enem%, zayhan palicalica han ku telek makaala tu sepatay a lasubu nu titekanay, u demiad sa kacacaledesan ku bali a dimiad. i labu nu kenisay a tademaw i Taywan a binacadan u punung namin, nilaculan u malukay ku yadahay. u i tidaay tu a kamu u punung a kamu. 1968 a mihca, namakayda i hung-yi akenis a niyadu' u hung-yi nu wawaay u miwai'tay tu mali a misekung, nakinacacay demecen tu ku dipun nu wawaay u namiwai'tay tu mali a misekung, malu nu caay kadayun nu liwliw mutideng i sapupu nu hekal i kitaki nu piunduan kyu u sakasenengan tu itini ku Taywan. sakasi ngangan tu tabakiay, mabawah tu ku Taywan nu paytuluay a miwai'tay tu mali sakasenengan a zitay ku mahida. ÁīÖŤĎČŚįĎś£íÁīÄŚŅĶť§® u sikinin nu wawa mimaliay a luma' ". i tay-ciw-sinan, sinipatideng tu cacay nu miwai'tay tu mali namin mizunbi a mituktuk tu miasekay a sasin, uyni ku han nu hung-yi a niyadu' tu sacumud a sasin, u '' hung-yi nu wawaay a mimaliay '' u kasenengan nu Taywan, tatengaay namakayniay i yin-pin a kenis. kahulanan i limaay a bataan idaw ku pituay a mihcaan nakinacacay madademec ku Taywa atu dipun masasekung, misanga tu kasenenga tu nikacakat, i tidaea tu misinga padeng i '' u hung-yi nu wawaay a mimali u sikinin a luma ''. sacumud a talabu i '' hung-yi nu wawaay a mimali u sikinin a luma ''. i labu yadah ku nipadeng tu yu mahida henay namilabu ku midemeca tu sapidademecan nu mimali a tuud, hacacaay sa ku kawlah atu sasing, yu mahida u miasipay tu nipangiha a kawaw, u demiad mahida u tadikuday aca tu inaayaway, u sakahemekan nu tademaw u sakasenenga aca nu tantandaw; u demiad anu mamalawpes aca, ya tademaw nai' tu namin, nika paliwan tu sakay sapaduduc nu lingatu, u hung-yi nu wawaay a mimaliay a makakilukilu sa ku wawa tu lalangawan, sidikuc tu hung-yiay a dikuc i pimalian a maduba, yu mahida sa mabawbaw ku balucu' tu sakay i pimalian a sisepi, katukuh hayayda mahida hen ku baded i Taywan. i naayaw u hung-yi picudadan nu wawa u sasadangan ci Lin-cu-pung nai' ku tahkalay sisa caay kakapah, nipiadih tu wawa nu yincumin sisiicelang namin manamuh tu hekalay a miladlad atu miadup, sangalepan tu sakay i yakiw nu mali micidek ku namuh, sisa sibalucu tu ci Lin-cu-pung a patideng tu sapiyakiw a mimali a midateng, kyu malingatu idaw kina micidekay nu wawaay a mimali. nu paymihcaan a kasenenga a kawaw atu nidatenga a misinga i hung-yi nuwawaay a picudadan ilabu nu cacudadan sisikinin ku hung-yi nu wawaay namimali a luma, i labu nu luma masilac tu ku naayaway nu hung-yi a nicukaymasan tu maliay a tuud, u nisaicelanga nu wawaay a nipimali, u kahenulan a sasin, u tu tuud aca, mapatahkal tu naayaway u matalulay nu mimaliay a niladlad atu kasenengan, u kakilinan nu sapalahat tu nalaylayan a midang a kakitidaan nu Taywan. i pabaw nu luma i labu idaw ku nu bunung a tuud atu tatengilan, palalitemuhen mikumud ku nu bunung a lalangawan atu hung-yi nu wawaay a mimaliay, u mamipadang pakatineng a mitesek tu yincumicu i Taywan sapalahet tu kawaw atu talakaway nu eneng. . zayhan u hung-yi nuwawaay a mimaliay, i pusung u mimaliay a nipiladlad u kahenulan sakaidaw a mala dayhiw, i dadanan kanca anu malalitemuh i tepal nu mamalian mal cabaycabay tu mimal ku masacabayay, namin i cacudadan palekal tu minanan a mamimaliay, hina tayna i dumaan a kitaki maladayhiw nu kanatal midademec kanca silahci tu ku nikadademecan, idaw hen ku kakunglinan i pusung a kitidaan mikawaway tu mimaliay, u nikahida nu mimaliay katenes caay hen kamabasaw. ÁīÖŤĎČśļęś≥Č hung-yi a ungsi ungsi nu hung-yi iyadah sa ku nanum, tamelac saca kya nanum, unu tan-suwan a nanum, u akuti sa i 45~63‚ĄÉ hakiya, zayhan u liwliwliwan yadah hen ku kilakilangan, sakasienawan nu midangay a tademaw namin miadih tu kilang a misengel tu nanum a misasapi u sakapahay a tataydaan, nika namabaliyus matastas nu papa a bali, kyu haayda misakapah henay a misanga. ,śą≤śįī. i labu nu hung-yi a ungsi u sasengalan nu badet sa sepad a bataan idawku tusa tu, u saculal nu nanum sa cacay a lasubu sepad a bataan idaw ku tulu tu, caay kaputung ku nanum idaw tu, u ungsi nu hung-yi unu tanengay a tan-suwan-cin-na a nanum, kapah sa ku nanum takelal tamelac sa, nikalalamwlan nu lala' ku hung-yi, unu i cung-yang-san-may ta-na-aw malecay a ba'tu nu kenisan masumad malu makaydaay i baba'tuan muculalay a ungsi. u kamu satusa u hu-yiay a ungsin mikapah tu udip saan, sisa katuud tu ku tayniay misengel tu nanum itini i hung-yi ungsin misengel, misalama tu nanum. " SPAśļęś≥ČśĪ†,3 . '' nabakuan u pusung nu cung-ku-ko-ciya-hung akenis nu mikuwanay a kitidaan '' ayda malu nu hung-yi ungsin tu i pabaw nu dihek a sasawacan misanga tu nanumay piidangan, u hung-yi ungsi milikakawaw tu limaay a sasapian nu dabek u nisatakuan tu lalilucan a ungsin, tulu ku nisangaan tu cudetay a nisatakuan tu nanum atu tanengay a ungsi tu aadihan u caculilan, nu hekalay a pililucan, ilabu nu kilangay a luma u masacacayay a lalilucan sasalamaan a lalilucan, nu buyu' ay tahkalay a nanum tu sasalamaan, u sasapian a dabek, u aididtan a kitidaan namin tu nisangaan, kapah ku nilahcian. ŤĚīŤĚ∂Ťį∑ diheb nu adipapang yadah ku adipapang inaayaw sisa i sasawacanay angangan kyu sinanagan ku pusungku i yin-pin a kenis, nika i nadikudan zayhan idaw ku mitastasay, nai' tu ku adipapang mubahel i sasawacan, ayda nu mihmihcaan dumaan a tademaw sakayitini malingatu tu apaudip, kyu paluma tu mulangaway a lutuk a paudip. kina mulangaway a lutuklutukan a langaw atu sibaluaya a nipaluma tu bangsisay a langaw u sasilahci u kapahay a sikaidaw nu liwliway. . adipapang a diheb i taw-yin a niyadu' i saamisanan, unu lu-yi a kenis lung-tin a niyadu' u matatepal ku laed nu lu-niw a sawac u nika silsilan nu nanum ya wayway mahida u masapispisay a sawac, i saamisan sa malbelaw tu lung-tin a enal bangcai sa ku nipalumaan tu uciya a kitidaan, satimulan sa micapi tu taw-yin a niyadu' nu piadihan atu punung a niyadu'. u tamelac niya nanum i sawac maadih ku sasaay, nisakapahan tu sa, caay kaputung ku nanum, ahebal aca ku kakaydaan nu nanum, taneng kaansin tayda i sawac midang tu mikilihida tu misalama a nanumay; i sawac idaw ku nisangaan tu dabek u sasapian, taneng papahanhannan a mukan, ya papalumaan a langaw sinipaluma tu ma-tu-lin namin u sapakan tu engidtay hen a adipapang kakanan a lutuk atu wasasibaluay tu langaw matatudungusay ku kapah damsay a palangaw i liwliw. caay kalecadlecad ku demiad tayni mididaw, idaw hen ku masadumaay a langaw atu aadihan.
S.PHON: janpiŇč janpiŇč a sakuwan ku taituŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(bunun) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u atu bunun ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan janpiŇč mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, kainisuŇčan , kamisatu , kaminu , nakanu , su nun suŇč , bukr~…ĺa*u , kar~…ĺisańßan , minami , *akaŇčan , pasikau , tar~…ĺunas . ***(*****:inpiiŇč) **/km*, . jin-pin a k…ônis (u sasakamuan nu bunuŇč a kamu: r~…ĺnpiiŇč ) na i tajwan pusuŇčkuaj a k…ônis, i t…ôban nu pusuŇčku i, satipan mi ¶api tu i amisaj nu ńßaj-tuwan a k…ônis, saamis nu timur~…ĺan mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu r~…ĺu-ji a k…ônis, i sawar~…ĺi mi ¶api tu tuŇč-ńß…ô a k…ônis, satipan sa mi ¶api tu takaws…ô maw-r~…ĺi a k…ônis, pintuŇčku u Ē~ °-taj ak…ônis, i satimur~…ĺan mar~…ĺitin tupiwma a k…ônis, ńßamin nu ku u r~…ĺimaaj a buju Ē~ °aj nu jin ¶umin a kak…ônis, ńßamin nu tad…ômaw i k…ônis ńßatida u pituaj nu tad…ômaw/km*, ńßamin nukanatar~…ĺ idaw kja sakatur~…ĺuaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj a pikawawan, u jadańß nu tad…ômaw ńßawsa ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ u sadikudaj nu sakas…ôpad. u jin-pin a k…ônis i naajaw nu dipuŇč a zidaj Ē~ ° Ē~ ° pusuŇčtin kuwn-san- ¶iŇč pikuwan a k…ônis Ē~ ° Ē~ ° u nijdu Ē~ °nijadu Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i satimur~…ĺan nu paŇčkiw( nu saamisan nu paŇčkiw, ni kar~…ĺar~…ĺais tu nadikudan misaduma a ¶a patid…ôn tu ńßaj-tuwan a k…ônis ). ja kitidaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa kipabawan ku ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i buju Ē~ °aj a k…ônis siwa a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm%, zajńßan par~…ĺi ¶ar~…ĺi ¶a ńßan ku t…ôr~…ĺ…ôk makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpataj a r~…ĺasubu nu tit…ôkanaj, u d…ômiad sa ka ¶a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan ku bar~…ĺi a dimiad. i r~…ĺabu nu k…ônisaj a tad…ômaw i tajwan a bina ¶adan u punuŇč namin, nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u mar~…ĺukaj ku jadańßaj. u i tidaaj tu a kamu u punuŇč a kamu. **** a mińß ¶a, namakajda i ńßuŇč-ji ak…ônis a nijadu Ē~ ° u ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj u miwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi a mis…ôkuŇč, nakina ¶a ¶aj d…ôm…ô ¶…ôn tu ku dipun nu wawaaj u namiwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi a mis…ôkuŇč, mar~…ĺu nu ¶aaj kadajun nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mutid…ôŇč i sapupu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ i kitaki nu piunduan kju u sakas…ôn…ôŇčan tu itini ku tajwan. sakasi ŇčaŇčan tu tabakiaj, mabawańß tu ku tajwan nu pajtur~…ĺuaj a miwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a zitaj ku mańßida. ******* u sikinin nu wawa mimar~…ĺiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ". i taj- ¶iw-sinan, sinipatid…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj nu miwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi namin mizunbi a mituktuk tu mias…ôkaj a sasin, ujni ku ńßan nu ńßuŇč-ji a nijadu Ē~ ° tu sa ¶umud a sasin, u Ē~ ° Ē~ ° ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj Ē~ ° Ē~ ° u kas…ôn…ôŇčan nu tajwan, tat…ôŇčaaj namakajniaj i jin-pin a k…ônis. kańßur~…ĺanan i r~…ĺimaaj a bataan idaw ku pituaj a mińß ¶aan nakina ¶a ¶aj madad…ôm…ô ¶ ku tajwa atu dipun masas…ôkuŇč, misaŇča tu kas…ôn…ôŇča tu nika ¶akat, i tida…ôa tu misiŇča pad…ôŇč i Ē~ ° Ē~ ° u ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺi u sikinin a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° Ē~ °. sa ¶umud a tar~…ĺabu i Ē~ ° Ē~ ° ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺi u sikinin a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° Ē~ °. i r~…ĺabu jadańß ku nipad…ôŇč tu ju mańßida ńß…ônaj namir~…ĺabu ku mid…ôm…ô ¶a tu sapidad…ôm…ô ¶an nu mimar~…ĺi a tuud, ńßa ¶a ¶aaj sa ku kawr~…ĺańß atu sasiŇč, ju mańßida u miasipaj tu nipaŇčińßa a kawaw, u d…ômiad mańßida u tadikudaj a ¶a tu inaajawaj, u sakańß…ôm…ôkan nu tad…ômaw u sakas…ôn…ôŇča a ¶a nu tantandaw; u d…ômiad anu mamar~…ĺawp…ôs a ¶a, ja tad…ômaw nai Ē~ ° tu namin, nika par~…ĺiwan tu sakaj sapadudu ¶ nu r~…ĺiŇčatu, u ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj a makakir~…ĺukir~…ĺu sa ku wawa tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, sidiku ¶ tu ńßuŇč-jiaj a diku ¶ i pimar~…ĺian a maduba, ju mańßida sa mabawbaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu sakaj i pimar~…ĺian a sis…ôpi, katukuńß ńßajajda mańßida ńß…ôn ku bad…ôd i tajwan. i naajaw u ńßuŇč-ji pi ¶udadan nu wawa u sasadaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶u-puŇč nai Ē~ ° ku tańßkar~…ĺaj sisa ¶aaj kakapańß, nipiadińß tu wawa nu jin ¶umin sisii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč namin manamuńß tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad atu miadup, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôpan tu sakaj i jakiw nu mar~…ĺi mi ¶id…ôk ku namuńß, sisa sibar~…ĺu ¶u tu ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶u-puŇč a patid…ôŇč tu sapijakiw a mimar~…ĺi a midat…ôŇč, kju mar~…ĺiŇčatu idaw kina mi ¶id…ôkaj nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺi. nu pajmińß ¶aan a kas…ôn…ôŇča a kawaw atu nidat…ôŇča a misiŇča i ńßuŇč-ji nuwawaaj a pi ¶udadan ir~…ĺabu nu ¶a ¶udadan sisikinin ku ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj namimar~…ĺi a r~…ĺuma, i r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma masir~…ĺa ¶ tu ku naajawaj nu ńßuŇč-ji a ni ¶ukajmasan tu mar~…ĺiaj a tuud, u nisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇča nu wawaaj a nipimar~…ĺi, u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sasin, u tu tuud a ¶a, mapatańßkar~…ĺ tu naajawaj u matar~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu mimar~…ĺiaj a nir~…ĺadr~…ĺad atu kas…ôn…ôŇčan, u kakir~…ĺinan nu sapar~…ĺańßat tu nar~…ĺajr~…ĺajan a midaŇč a kakitidaan nu tajwan. i pabaw nu r~…ĺuma i r~…ĺabu idaw ku nu bunuŇč a tuud atu tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, par~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß…ôn mikumud ku nu bunuŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj, u mamipadaŇč pakatin…ôŇč a mit…ôs…ôk tu jin ¶umi ¶u i tajwan sapar~…ĺańß…ôt tu kawaw atu tar~…ĺakawaj nu …ôn…ôŇč. . zajńßan u ńßuŇč-ji nuwawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj, i pusuŇč u mimar~…ĺiaj a nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad u kańß…ônur~…ĺan sakaidaw a mar~…ĺa dajńßiw, i dadanan kan ¶a anu mar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß i t…ôpar~…ĺ nu mamar~…ĺian mar~…ĺ ¶abaj ¶abaj tu mimar~…ĺ ku masa ¶abajaj, namin i ¶a ¶udadan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu minanan a mamimar~…ĺiaj, ńßina tajna i dumaan a kitaki mar~…ĺadajńßiw nu kanatar~…ĺ midad…ôm…ô ¶ kan ¶a sir~…ĺańß ¶i tu ku nikadad…ôm…ô ¶an, idaw ńß…ôn ku kakuŇčr~…ĺinan i pusuŇč a kitidaan mikawawaj tu mimar~…ĺiaj, u nikańßida nu mimar~…ĺiaj kat…ôn…ôs ¶aaj ńß…ôn kamabasaw. **** ńßuŇč-ji a uŇčsi uŇčsi nu ńßuŇč-ji ijadańß sa ku nanum, tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ sa ¶a kja nanum, unu tan-suwan a nanum, u akuti sa i **~*** ńßakija, zajńßan u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan jadańß ńß…ôn ku kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakasi…ônawan nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw namin miadińß tu kir~…ĺaŇč a mis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu nanum a misasapi u sakapańßaj a tatajdaan, nika namabar~…ĺijus matastas nu papa a bar~…ĺi, kju ńßaajda misakapańß ńß…ônaj a misaŇča. ,**. i r~…ĺabu nu ńßuŇč-ji a uŇčsi u sas…ôŇčar~…ĺan nu bad…ôt sa s…ôpad a bataan idawku tusa tu, u sa ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ nu nanum sa ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpad a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu tu, ¶aaj kaputuŇč ku nanum idaw tu, u uŇčsi nu ńßuŇč-ji unu tan…ôŇčaj a tan-suwan- ¶in-na a nanum, kapańß sa ku nanum tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ sa, nikar~…ĺar~…ĺamwr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku ńßuŇč-ji, unu i ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj ta-na-aw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a ba Ē~ °tu nu k…ônisan masumad mar~…ĺu makajdaaj i baba Ē~ °tuan mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺaj a uŇčsi. u kamu satusa u ńßu-jiaj a uŇčsin mikapańß tu udip saan, sisa katuud tu ku tajniaj mis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu nanum itini i ńßuŇč-ji uŇčsin mis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ, misar~…ĺama tu nanum. " spa***,* . Ē~ ° Ē~ ° nabakuan u pusuŇč nu ¶uŇč-ku-ko- ¶ija-ńßuŇč ak…ônis nu mikuwanaj a kitidaan Ē~ ° Ē~ ° ajda mar~…ĺu nu ńßuŇč-ji uŇčsin tu i pabaw nu dińß…ôk a sasawa ¶an misaŇča tu nanumaj piidaŇčan, u ńßuŇč-ji uŇčsi mir~…ĺikakawaw tu r~…ĺimaaj a sasapian nu dab…ôk u nisatakuan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an a uŇčsin, tur~…ĺu ku nisaŇčaan tu ¶ud…ôtaj a nisatakuan tu nanum atu tan…ôŇčaj a uŇčsi tu aadińßan u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a pir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an, ir~…ĺabu nu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a r~…ĺuma u masa ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an sasar~…ĺamaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an, nu buju Ē~ ° aj tańßkar~…ĺaj a nanum tu sasar~…ĺamaan, u sasapian a dab…ôk, u aididtan a kitidaan namin tu nisaŇčaan, kapańß ku nir~…ĺańß ¶ian. *** dińß…ôb nu adipapaŇč jadańß ku adipapaŇč inaajaw sisa i sasawa ¶anaj aŇčaŇčan kju sinanagan ku pusuŇčku i jin-pin a k…ônis, nika i nadikudan zajńßan idaw ku mitastasaj, nai Ē~ ° tu ku adipapaŇč mubańß…ôr~…ĺ i sasawa ¶an, ajda nu mińßmińß ¶aan dumaan a tad…ômaw sakajitini mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu apaudip, kju par~…ĺuma tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk a paudip. kina mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan a r~…ĺaŇčaw atu sibar~…ĺuaja a nipar~…ĺuma tu baŇčsisaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw u sasir~…ĺańß ¶i u kapańßaj a sikaidaw nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj. . adipapaŇč a dińß…ôb i taw-jin a nijadu Ē~ ° i saamisanan, unu r~…ĺu-ji a k…ônis r~…ĺuŇč-tin a nijadu Ē~ ° u matat…ôpar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺa…ôd nu r~…ĺu-niw a sawa ¶ u nika sir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu nanum ja wajwaj mańßida u masapispisaj a sawa ¶, i saamisan sa mar~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺaw tu r~…ĺuŇč-tin a …ônar~…ĺ baŇč ¶ai sa ku nipar~…ĺumaan tu u ¶ija a kitidaan, satimur~…ĺan sa mi ¶api tu taw-jin a nijadu Ē~ ° nu piadińßan atu punuŇč a nijadu Ē~ °. u tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nija nanum i sawa ¶ maadińß ku sasaaj, nisakapańßan tu sa, ¶aaj kaputuŇč ku nanum, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ a ¶a ku kakajdaan nu nanum, tan…ôŇč kaansin tajda i sawa ¶ midaŇč tu mikir~…ĺińßida tu misar~…ĺama a nanumaj; i sawa ¶ idaw ku nisaŇčaan tu dab…ôk u sasapian, tan…ôŇč papańßanńßannan a mukan, ja papar~…ĺumaan a r~…ĺaŇčaw sinipar~…ĺuma tu ma-tu-r~…ĺin namin u sapakan tu …ôŇčidtaj ńß…ôn a adipapaŇč kakanan a r~…ĺutuk atu wasasibar~…ĺuaj tu r~…ĺaŇčaw matatuduŇčusaj ku kapańß damsaj a par~…ĺaŇčaw i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw. ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adr~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku d…ômiad tajni mididaw, idaw ńß…ôn ku masadumaaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw atu aadińßan.
S.FORM: Yanping Yanping a sakuwan ku Taitung. kumud nu kalesakan, 480.64 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 419.42 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 48.33 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 3,828 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,131 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 3,523 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 92%(Bunun) ku kasabinawlan. u atu Bunun ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Yanping mala 5 a cuwen atu 11 ku niyazu'. kina 11 a niyazu'sa, Kainisungan , Kamisatu , Kaminu , Nakanu , Su nun sung , Buklavu , Kalisahan , Minami , Vakangan , Pasikau , Talunas . ŚĽ∂ŚĻ≥ťĄČ(ťÉ°Áĺ§ŚłÉŤĺ≤Ť™ě:Inpiing) 7šļļ/km¬≤, . yin-pin a kenis (u sasakamuan nu bunung a kamu: lnpiing ) na i Taywan pusungkuay a kenis, i teban nu pusungku i, satipan micapi tu i amisay nu hay-tuwan a kenis, saamis nu timulan malalitin tu lu-yi a kenis, i sawali micapi tu tung-he a kenis, satipan sa micapi tu takawse maw-li a kenis, pintungku u'-tay akenis, i satimulan malitin tupiwma a kenis, hamin nu ku u limaay a buyu'ay nu yincumin a kakenis, hamin nu tademaw i kenis hatida u pituay nu tademaw/km2, hamin nukanatal idaw kya sakatuluay nu talakaway a pikawawan, u yadah nu tademaw hawsa hamin nu kanatal u sadikuday nu sakasepad. u yin-pin a kenis i naayaw nu dipung a ziday '' pusungtin kuwn-san-cing pikuwan a kenis '' u niydu'niyadu'ay a lala' i satimulan nu pangkiw( nu saamisan nu pangkiw, ni kalalais tu nadikudan misaduma aca patiden tu hay-tuwan a kenis ). ya kitidaan nu lala' sa kipabawan ku cung-yang-san-may, u ahebal nu lala' i buyu'ay a kenis siwa a bataan idaw ku enem%, zayhan palicalica han ku telek makaala tu sepatay a lasubu nu titekanay, u demiad sa kacacaledesan ku bali a dimiad. i labu nu kenisay a tademaw i Taywan a binacadan u punung namin, nilaculan u malukay ku yadahay. u i tidaay tu a kamu u punung a kamu. 1968 a mihca, namakayda i hung-yi akenis a niyadu' u hung-yi nu wawaay u miwai'tay tu mali a misekung, nakinacacay demecen tu ku dipun nu wawaay u namiwai'tay tu mali a misekung, malu nu caay kadayun nu liwliw mutideng i sapupu nu hekal i kitaki nu piunduan kyu u sakasenengan tu itini ku Taywan. sakasi ngangan tu tabakiay, mabawah tu ku Taywan nu paytuluay a miwai'tay tu mali sakasenengan a zitay ku mahida. ÁīÖŤĎČŚįĎś£íÁīÄŚŅĶť§® u sikinin nu wawa mimaliay a luma' ". i tay-ciw-sinan, sinipatideng tu cacay nu miwai'tay tu mali namin mizunbi a mituktuk tu miasekay a sasin, uyni ku han nu hung-yi a niyadu' tu sacumud a sasin, u '' hung-yi nu wawaay a mimaliay '' u kasenengan nu Taywan, tatengaay namakayniay i yin-pin a kenis. kahulanan i limaay a bataan idaw ku pituay a mihcaan nakinacacay madademec ku Taywa atu dipun masasekung, misanga tu kasenenga tu nikacakat, i tidaea tu misinga padeng i '' u hung-yi nu wawaay a mimali u sikinin a luma ''. sacumud a talabu i '' hung-yi nu wawaay a mimali u sikinin a luma ''. i labu yadah ku nipadeng tu yu mahida henay namilabu ku midemeca tu sapidademecan nu mimali a tuud, hacacaay sa ku kawlah atu sasing, yu mahida u miasipay tu nipangiha a kawaw, u demiad mahida u tadikuday aca tu inaayaway, u sakahemekan nu tademaw u sakasenenga aca nu tantandaw; u demiad anu mamalawpes aca, ya tademaw nai' tu namin, nika paliwan tu sakay sapaduduc nu lingatu, u hung-yi nu wawaay a mimaliay a makakilukilu sa ku wawa tu lalangawan, sidikuc tu hung-yiay a dikuc i pimalian a maduba, yu mahida sa mabawbaw ku balucu' tu sakay i pimalian a sisepi, katukuh hayayda mahida hen ku baded i Taywan. i naayaw u hung-yi picudadan nu wawa u sasadangan ci Lin-cu-pung nai' ku tahkalay sisa caay kakapah, nipiadih tu wawa nu yincumin sisiicelang namin manamuh tu hekalay a miladlad atu miadup, sangalepan tu sakay i yakiw nu mali micidek ku namuh, sisa sibalucu tu ci Lin-cu-pung a patideng tu sapiyakiw a mimali a midateng, kyu malingatu idaw kina micidekay nu wawaay a mimali. nu paymihcaan a kasenenga a kawaw atu nidatenga a misinga i hung-yi nuwawaay a picudadan ilabu nu cacudadan sisikinin ku hung-yi nu wawaay namimali a luma, i labu nu luma masilac tu ku naayaway nu hung-yi a nicukaymasan tu maliay a tuud, u nisaicelanga nu wawaay a nipimali, u kahenulan a sasin, u tu tuud aca, mapatahkal tu naayaway u matalulay nu mimaliay a niladlad atu kasenengan, u kakilinan nu sapalahat tu nalaylayan a midang a kakitidaan nu Taywan. i pabaw nu luma i labu idaw ku nu bunung a tuud atu tatengilan, palalitemuhen mikumud ku nu bunung a lalangawan atu hung-yi nu wawaay a mimaliay, u mamipadang pakatineng a mitesek tu yincumicu i Taywan sapalahet tu kawaw atu talakaway nu eneng. . zayhan u hung-yi nuwawaay a mimaliay, i pusung u mimaliay a nipiladlad u kahenulan sakaidaw a mala dayhiw, i dadanan kanca anu malalitemuh i tepal nu mamalian mal cabaycabay tu mimal ku masacabayay, namin i cacudadan palekal tu minanan a mamimaliay, hina tayna i dumaan a kitaki maladayhiw nu kanatal midademec kanca silahci tu ku nikadademecan, idaw hen ku kakunglinan i pusung a kitidaan mikawaway tu mimaliay, u nikahida nu mimaliay katenes caay hen kamabasaw. ÁīÖŤĎČśļęś≥Č hung-yi a ungsi ungsi nu hung-yi iyadah sa ku nanum, tamelac saca kya nanum, unu tan-suwan a nanum, u akuti sa i 45~63‚ĄÉ hakiya, zayhan u liwliwliwan yadah hen ku kilakilangan, sakasienawan nu midangay a tademaw namin miadih tu kilang a misengel tu nanum a misasapi u sakapahay a tataydaan, nika namabaliyus matastas nu papa a bali, kyu haayda misakapah henay a misanga. ,śą≤śįī. i labu nu hung-yi a ungsi u sasengalan nu badet sa sepad a bataan idawku tusa tu, u saculal nu nanum sa cacay a lasubu sepad a bataan idaw ku tulu tu, caay kaputung ku nanum idaw tu, u ungsi nu hung-yi unu tanengay a tan-suwan-cin-na a nanum, kapah sa ku nanum takelal tamelac sa, nikalalamwlan nu lala' ku hung-yi, unu i cung-yang-san-may ta-na-aw malecay a ba'tu nu kenisan masumad malu makaydaay i baba'tuan muculalay a ungsi. u kamu satusa u hu-yiay a ungsin mikapah tu udip saan, sisa katuud tu ku tayniay misengel tu nanum itini i hung-yi ungsin misengel, misalama tu nanum. " SPAśļęś≥ČśĪ†,3 . '' nabakuan u pusung nu cung-ku-ko-ciya-hung akenis nu mikuwanay a kitidaan '' ayda malu nu hung-yi ungsin tu i pabaw nu dihek a sasawacan misanga tu nanumay piidangan, u hung-yi ungsi milikakawaw tu limaay a sasapian nu dabek u nisatakuan tu lalilucan a ungsin, tulu ku nisangaan tu cudetay a nisatakuan tu nanum atu tanengay a ungsi tu aadihan u caculilan, nu hekalay a pililucan, ilabu nu kilangay a luma u masacacayay a lalilucan sasalamaan a lalilucan, nu buyu' ay tahkalay a nanum tu sasalamaan, u sasapian a dabek, u aididtan a kitidaan namin tu nisangaan, kapah ku nilahcian. ŤĚīŤĚ∂Ťį∑ diheb nu adipapang yadah ku adipapang inaayaw sisa i sasawacanay angangan kyu sinanagan ku pusungku i yin-pin a kenis, nika i nadikudan zayhan idaw ku mitastasay, nai' tu ku adipapang mubahel i sasawacan, ayda nu mihmihcaan dumaan a tademaw sakayitini malingatu tu apaudip, kyu paluma tu mulangaway a lutuk a paudip. kina mulangaway a lutuklutukan a langaw atu sibaluaya a nipaluma tu bangsisay a langaw u sasilahci u kapahay a sikaidaw nu liwliway. . adipapang a diheb i taw-yin a niyadu' i saamisanan, unu lu-yi a kenis lung-tin a niyadu' u matatepal ku laed nu lu-niw a sawac u nika silsilan nu nanum ya wayway mahida u masapispisay a sawac, i saamisan sa malbelaw tu lung-tin a enal bangcai sa ku nipalumaan tu uciya a kitidaan, satimulan sa micapi tu taw-yin a niyadu' nu piadihan atu punung a niyadu'. u tamelac niya nanum i sawac maadih ku sasaay, nisakapahan tu sa, caay kaputung ku nanum, ahebal aca ku kakaydaan nu nanum, taneng kaansin tayda i sawac midang tu mikilihida tu misalama a nanumay; i sawac idaw ku nisangaan tu dabek u sasapian, taneng papahanhannan a mukan, ya papalumaan a langaw sinipaluma tu ma-tu-lin namin u sapakan tu engidtay hen a adipapang kakanan a lutuk atu wasasibaluay tu langaw matatudungusay ku kapah damsay a palangaw i liwliw. caay kalecadlecad ku demiad tayni mididaw, idaw hen ku masadumaay a langaw atu aadihan.
S.PHON: janpiŇč janpiŇč a sakuwan ku taituŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(bunun) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u atu bunun ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan janpiŇč mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, kainisuŇčan , kamisatu , kaminu , nakanu , su nun suŇč , bukr~…ĺa*u , kar~…ĺisańßan , minami , *akaŇčan , pasikau , tar~…ĺunas . ***(*****:inpiiŇč) **/km*, . jin-pin a k…ônis (u sasakamuan nu bunuŇč a kamu: r~…ĺnpiiŇč ) na i tajwan pusuŇčkuaj a k…ônis, i t…ôban nu pusuŇčku i, satipan mi ¶api tu i amisaj nu ńßaj-tuwan a k…ônis, saamis nu timur~…ĺan mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu r~…ĺu-ji a k…ônis, i sawar~…ĺi mi ¶api tu tuŇč-ńß…ô a k…ônis, satipan sa mi ¶api tu takaws…ô maw-r~…ĺi a k…ônis, pintuŇčku u Ē~ °-taj ak…ônis, i satimur~…ĺan mar~…ĺitin tupiwma a k…ônis, ńßamin nu ku u r~…ĺimaaj a buju Ē~ °aj nu jin ¶umin a kak…ônis, ńßamin nu tad…ômaw i k…ônis ńßatida u pituaj nu tad…ômaw/km*, ńßamin nukanatar~…ĺ idaw kja sakatur~…ĺuaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj a pikawawan, u jadańß nu tad…ômaw ńßawsa ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ u sadikudaj nu sakas…ôpad. u jin-pin a k…ônis i naajaw nu dipuŇč a zidaj Ē~ ° Ē~ ° pusuŇčtin kuwn-san- ¶iŇč pikuwan a k…ônis Ē~ ° Ē~ ° u nijdu Ē~ °nijadu Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i satimur~…ĺan nu paŇčkiw( nu saamisan nu paŇčkiw, ni kar~…ĺar~…ĺais tu nadikudan misaduma a ¶a patid…ôn tu ńßaj-tuwan a k…ônis ). ja kitidaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa kipabawan ku ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i buju Ē~ °aj a k…ônis siwa a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm%, zajńßan par~…ĺi ¶ar~…ĺi ¶a ńßan ku t…ôr~…ĺ…ôk makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpataj a r~…ĺasubu nu tit…ôkanaj, u d…ômiad sa ka ¶a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan ku bar~…ĺi a dimiad. i r~…ĺabu nu k…ônisaj a tad…ômaw i tajwan a bina ¶adan u punuŇč namin, nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u mar~…ĺukaj ku jadańßaj. u i tidaaj tu a kamu u punuŇč a kamu. **** a mińß ¶a, namakajda i ńßuŇč-ji ak…ônis a nijadu Ē~ ° u ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj u miwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi a mis…ôkuŇč, nakina ¶a ¶aj d…ôm…ô ¶…ôn tu ku dipun nu wawaaj u namiwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi a mis…ôkuŇč, mar~…ĺu nu ¶aaj kadajun nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mutid…ôŇč i sapupu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ i kitaki nu piunduan kju u sakas…ôn…ôŇčan tu itini ku tajwan. sakasi ŇčaŇčan tu tabakiaj, mabawańß tu ku tajwan nu pajtur~…ĺuaj a miwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a zitaj ku mańßida. ******* u sikinin nu wawa mimar~…ĺiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ". i taj- ¶iw-sinan, sinipatid…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj nu miwai Ē~ °taj tu mar~…ĺi namin mizunbi a mituktuk tu mias…ôkaj a sasin, ujni ku ńßan nu ńßuŇč-ji a nijadu Ē~ ° tu sa ¶umud a sasin, u Ē~ ° Ē~ ° ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj Ē~ ° Ē~ ° u kas…ôn…ôŇčan nu tajwan, tat…ôŇčaaj namakajniaj i jin-pin a k…ônis. kańßur~…ĺanan i r~…ĺimaaj a bataan idaw ku pituaj a mińß ¶aan nakina ¶a ¶aj madad…ôm…ô ¶ ku tajwa atu dipun masas…ôkuŇč, misaŇča tu kas…ôn…ôŇča tu nika ¶akat, i tida…ôa tu misiŇča pad…ôŇč i Ē~ ° Ē~ ° u ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺi u sikinin a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° Ē~ °. sa ¶umud a tar~…ĺabu i Ē~ ° Ē~ ° ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺi u sikinin a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° Ē~ °. i r~…ĺabu jadańß ku nipad…ôŇč tu ju mańßida ńß…ônaj namir~…ĺabu ku mid…ôm…ô ¶a tu sapidad…ôm…ô ¶an nu mimar~…ĺi a tuud, ńßa ¶a ¶aaj sa ku kawr~…ĺańß atu sasiŇč, ju mańßida u miasipaj tu nipaŇčińßa a kawaw, u d…ômiad mańßida u tadikudaj a ¶a tu inaajawaj, u sakańß…ôm…ôkan nu tad…ômaw u sakas…ôn…ôŇča a ¶a nu tantandaw; u d…ômiad anu mamar~…ĺawp…ôs a ¶a, ja tad…ômaw nai Ē~ ° tu namin, nika par~…ĺiwan tu sakaj sapadudu ¶ nu r~…ĺiŇčatu, u ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj a makakir~…ĺukir~…ĺu sa ku wawa tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, sidiku ¶ tu ńßuŇč-jiaj a diku ¶ i pimar~…ĺian a maduba, ju mańßida sa mabawbaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu sakaj i pimar~…ĺian a sis…ôpi, katukuńß ńßajajda mańßida ńß…ôn ku bad…ôd i tajwan. i naajaw u ńßuŇč-ji pi ¶udadan nu wawa u sasadaŇčan ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶u-puŇč nai Ē~ ° ku tańßkar~…ĺaj sisa ¶aaj kakapańß, nipiadińß tu wawa nu jin ¶umin sisii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč namin manamuńß tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a mir~…ĺadr~…ĺad atu miadup, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôpan tu sakaj i jakiw nu mar~…ĺi mi ¶id…ôk ku namuńß, sisa sibar~…ĺu ¶u tu ¶i r~…ĺin- ¶u-puŇč a patid…ôŇč tu sapijakiw a mimar~…ĺi a midat…ôŇč, kju mar~…ĺiŇčatu idaw kina mi ¶id…ôkaj nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺi. nu pajmińß ¶aan a kas…ôn…ôŇča a kawaw atu nidat…ôŇča a misiŇča i ńßuŇč-ji nuwawaaj a pi ¶udadan ir~…ĺabu nu ¶a ¶udadan sisikinin ku ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj namimar~…ĺi a r~…ĺuma, i r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma masir~…ĺa ¶ tu ku naajawaj nu ńßuŇč-ji a ni ¶ukajmasan tu mar~…ĺiaj a tuud, u nisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇča nu wawaaj a nipimar~…ĺi, u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sasin, u tu tuud a ¶a, mapatańßkar~…ĺ tu naajawaj u matar~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu mimar~…ĺiaj a nir~…ĺadr~…ĺad atu kas…ôn…ôŇčan, u kakir~…ĺinan nu sapar~…ĺańßat tu nar~…ĺajr~…ĺajan a midaŇč a kakitidaan nu tajwan. i pabaw nu r~…ĺuma i r~…ĺabu idaw ku nu bunuŇč a tuud atu tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, par~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß…ôn mikumud ku nu bunuŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu ńßuŇč-ji nu wawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj, u mamipadaŇč pakatin…ôŇč a mit…ôs…ôk tu jin ¶umi ¶u i tajwan sapar~…ĺańß…ôt tu kawaw atu tar~…ĺakawaj nu …ôn…ôŇč. . zajńßan u ńßuŇč-ji nuwawaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj, i pusuŇč u mimar~…ĺiaj a nipir~…ĺadr~…ĺad u kańß…ônur~…ĺan sakaidaw a mar~…ĺa dajńßiw, i dadanan kan ¶a anu mar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńß i t…ôpar~…ĺ nu mamar~…ĺian mar~…ĺ ¶abaj ¶abaj tu mimar~…ĺ ku masa ¶abajaj, namin i ¶a ¶udadan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu minanan a mamimar~…ĺiaj, ńßina tajna i dumaan a kitaki mar~…ĺadajńßiw nu kanatar~…ĺ midad…ôm…ô ¶ kan ¶a sir~…ĺańß ¶i tu ku nikadad…ôm…ô ¶an, idaw ńß…ôn ku kakuŇčr~…ĺinan i pusuŇč a kitidaan mikawawaj tu mimar~…ĺiaj, u nikańßida nu mimar~…ĺiaj kat…ôn…ôs ¶aaj ńß…ôn kamabasaw. **** ńßuŇč-ji a uŇčsi uŇčsi nu ńßuŇč-ji ijadańß sa ku nanum, tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ sa ¶a kja nanum, unu tan-suwan a nanum, u akuti sa i **~*** ńßakija, zajńßan u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan jadańß ńß…ôn ku kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakasi…ônawan nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw namin miadińß tu kir~…ĺaŇč a mis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu nanum a misasapi u sakapańßaj a tatajdaan, nika namabar~…ĺijus matastas nu papa a bar~…ĺi, kju ńßaajda misakapańß ńß…ônaj a misaŇča. ,**. i r~…ĺabu nu ńßuŇč-ji a uŇčsi u sas…ôŇčar~…ĺan nu bad…ôt sa s…ôpad a bataan idawku tusa tu, u sa ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ nu nanum sa ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpad a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu tu, ¶aaj kaputuŇč ku nanum idaw tu, u uŇčsi nu ńßuŇč-ji unu tan…ôŇčaj a tan-suwan- ¶in-na a nanum, kapańß sa ku nanum tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ sa, nikar~…ĺar~…ĺamwr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku ńßuŇč-ji, unu i ¶uŇč-jaŇč-san-maj ta-na-aw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a ba Ē~ °tu nu k…ônisan masumad mar~…ĺu makajdaaj i baba Ē~ °tuan mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺaj a uŇčsi. u kamu satusa u ńßu-jiaj a uŇčsin mikapańß tu udip saan, sisa katuud tu ku tajniaj mis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu nanum itini i ńßuŇč-ji uŇčsin mis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ, misar~…ĺama tu nanum. " spa***,* . Ē~ ° Ē~ ° nabakuan u pusuŇč nu ¶uŇč-ku-ko- ¶ija-ńßuŇč ak…ônis nu mikuwanaj a kitidaan Ē~ ° Ē~ ° ajda mar~…ĺu nu ńßuŇč-ji uŇčsin tu i pabaw nu dińß…ôk a sasawa ¶an misaŇča tu nanumaj piidaŇčan, u ńßuŇč-ji uŇčsi mir~…ĺikakawaw tu r~…ĺimaaj a sasapian nu dab…ôk u nisatakuan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an a uŇčsin, tur~…ĺu ku nisaŇčaan tu ¶ud…ôtaj a nisatakuan tu nanum atu tan…ôŇčaj a uŇčsi tu aadińßan u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a pir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an, ir~…ĺabu nu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a r~…ĺuma u masa ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an sasar~…ĺamaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an, nu buju Ē~ ° aj tańßkar~…ĺaj a nanum tu sasar~…ĺamaan, u sasapian a dab…ôk, u aididtan a kitidaan namin tu nisaŇčaan, kapańß ku nir~…ĺańß ¶ian. *** dińß…ôb nu adipapaŇč jadańß ku adipapaŇč inaajaw sisa i sasawa ¶anaj aŇčaŇčan kju sinanagan ku pusuŇčku i jin-pin a k…ônis, nika i nadikudan zajńßan idaw ku mitastasaj, nai Ē~ ° tu ku adipapaŇč mubańß…ôr~…ĺ i sasawa ¶an, ajda nu mińßmińß ¶aan dumaan a tad…ômaw sakajitini mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu apaudip, kju par~…ĺuma tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutuk a paudip. kina mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan a r~…ĺaŇčaw atu sibar~…ĺuaja a nipar~…ĺuma tu baŇčsisaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw u sasir~…ĺańß ¶i u kapańßaj a sikaidaw nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj. . adipapaŇč a dińß…ôb i taw-jin a nijadu Ē~ ° i saamisanan, unu r~…ĺu-ji a k…ônis r~…ĺuŇč-tin a nijadu Ē~ ° u matat…ôpar~…ĺ ku r~…ĺa…ôd nu r~…ĺu-niw a sawa ¶ u nika sir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu nanum ja wajwaj mańßida u masapispisaj a sawa ¶, i saamisan sa mar~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺaw tu r~…ĺuŇč-tin a …ônar~…ĺ baŇč ¶ai sa ku nipar~…ĺumaan tu u ¶ija a kitidaan, satimur~…ĺan sa mi ¶api tu taw-jin a nijadu Ē~ ° nu piadińßan atu punuŇč a nijadu Ē~ °. u tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nija nanum i sawa ¶ maadińß ku sasaaj, nisakapańßan tu sa, ¶aaj kaputuŇč ku nanum, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ a ¶a ku kakajdaan nu nanum, tan…ôŇč kaansin tajda i sawa ¶ midaŇč tu mikir~…ĺińßida tu misar~…ĺama a nanumaj; i sawa ¶ idaw ku nisaŇčaan tu dab…ôk u sasapian, tan…ôŇč papańßanńßannan a mukan, ja papar~…ĺumaan a r~…ĺaŇčaw sinipar~…ĺuma tu ma-tu-r~…ĺin namin u sapakan tu …ôŇčidtaj ńß…ôn a adipapaŇč kakanan a r~…ĺutuk atu wasasibar~…ĺuaj tu r~…ĺaŇčaw matatuduŇčusaj ku kapańß damsaj a par~…ĺaŇčaw i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw. ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adr~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku d…ômiad tajni mididaw, idaw ńß…ôn ku masadumaaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw atu aadińßan.
